communities.name: Pima Canyon
communities.rule: Every current county parcel assigned to an approved Pima Canyon Estates plat, including The Enclave at Pima Canyon.

communities.name: Finisterra
communities.rule: Every current county parcel assigned to the recorded Finisterra I, II, or III plats.

communities.name: Ventana Canyon
communities.rule: Every residential parcel geographically behind and reached through the main Kolb Road gate, regardless of VCCA membership.
